children.description: Build an API-first, AI, or developer-tools company sold to enterprises or other developers — higher defensibility and longer sales cycles than B2C.
children.salaryRange: ₹0–₹20L founder salary; high equity potential if solving enterprise pain
children.roadmap: B.Tech → 2–3 yrs at product company or research lab → B2B problem identified → build with co-founder → seed → enterprise sales → scale

what_it_is: Building a technology company from zero targeting a real market problem.
who_its_not_for: Those who need salary certainty or cannot tolerate 2–3 years of uncertainty.
work_lifestyle: All-hands; no role boundaries; extreme ownership; irregular hours always.
entry_route: 2–3 yrs at a startup or product company; build network; identify problem.
timeline: 2–4 yrs experience recommended before founding; 3–5 yrs to PMF typically.
salary_range: ₹0–₹10L salary initially; wealth creation entirely via equity if successful.
growth_and_progression: Idea → MVP → pre-seed → seed → Series A → scale or acquisition.
demand_and_outlook: India's startup ecosystem active; YC, Sequoia, Elevation fund many CS founders.
honest_caveat: 90%+ startups fail; personal runway of 18–24 months minimum essential.

what_it_is: Creating companies, managing products, or going independent with CS skills.
who_its_not_for: Those who need salary certainty or dislike extreme ownership and ambiguity.
work_lifestyle: All-hands at startups; cross-functional for PMs; self-directed for independents.
entry_route: 2–3 yrs SDE experience; network; identify problem or switch from engineering.
timeline: 2–4 yrs industry then PM switch or founding; 3–5 yrs to meaningful traction.
salary_range: ₹18L–₹60L for PM at senior level; equity upside for founders if successful.
growth_and_progression: PM → senior PM → group PM → CPO; or founder → CEO; or freelancer → agency.
demand_and_outlook: High for experienced PMs; startup ecosystem active with 100+ unicorns.
honest_caveat: 90% startups fail; PM roles require business acumen beyond pure CS skills.

root.name: Mechanical
root.description: Career paths for B.Tech / B.E. — Mechanical in India

children.name: Core Mechanical Engineering and Manufacturing
children.description: Design, manufacturing, and production roles that directly apply the Mechanical engineering degree in India's industrial sectors.

children.name: Product Design and Development
children.description: Conceptualise, model, and validate physical products from consumer goods to industrial machinery using CAD and simulation tools.

children.name: Automotive Product Design Engineer
children.description: Design vehicle components — body structures, suspension systems, chassis, and interiors — at Indian OEMs and Tier-1 automotive suppliers.

children.name: Body and Structures Design Engineer
children.description: Design and validate car body panels, closures, and structural frames using CATIA and FEA at Tata Motors, Mahindra, or Maruti Suzuki.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → CAD and FEA projects → GET at OEM → body structures team → senior design engineer in 3–4 yrs

children.name: Suspension and Chassis Design Engineer
children.description: Design and optimise suspension geometry, steering linkages, and chassis structures for ride, handling, and durability performance at OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → vehicle dynamics elective and CAD portfolio → GET at OEM or Tier-1 → chassis team → senior engineer in 4 yrs

what_it_is: Engineering the physical components that make up cars and two-wheelers.
who_its_not_for: Those who want software-first or digital product careers exclusively.
work_lifestyle: CAD and FEA simulation; design reviews; prototype validation on test track.
entry_route: Campus placement at Tata Motors, Mahindra, or Maruti Tier-1 suppliers.
timeline: GET → design engineer in 1–2 yrs; senior in 4–5 yrs.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹18L; Tier-1 MNC suppliers like Bosch and Valeo pay higher.
growth_and_progression: Design engineer → senior → lead → vehicle programme manager.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; India's auto sector is third largest globally by volume.
honest_caveat: Traditional ICE vehicle roles may shrink as EV transition accelerates.

children.name: Industrial and Consumer Product Designer
children.description: Design industrial machinery, FMCG packaging equipment, and consumer durables at engineering companies and product development consultancies.

children.name: Industrial Machinery Designer
children.description: Design production line equipment, jigs, fixtures, and special purpose machines for manufacturing plants across automotive, FMCG, and pharmaceutical sectors.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → SolidWorks and FEA projects → GET at machinery OEM → design engineer → senior designer in 3–4 yrs

children.name: Consumer Durables and FMCG Product Designer
children.description: Design home appliances, kitchen equipment, and consumer goods at companies like Godrej Appliances, Havells, or product development consultancies.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → consumer product portfolio and internship → design engineer at appliance company → senior product designer in 3–4 yrs

what_it_is: Creating physical products from concept to manufacturable design drawings.
who_its_not_for: Those who want automotive OEM work or factory operations roles specifically.
work_lifestyle: CAD workstation and prototype lab; client briefs; design-for-manufacture reviews.
entry_route: Strong SolidWorks portfolio; GET at engineering product company or consultancy.
timeline: Product design engineer in 1–2 yrs; senior in 4 yrs; design lead in 6–7 yrs.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹18L; MNC consumer goods and medical device firms pay at the top.
growth_and_progression: Design engineer → senior → design lead → R&D manager → director design.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; India's manufacturing sector and consumer market growing together.
honest_caveat: Portfolio quality matters far more than college brand in design hiring.

what_it_is: Designing mechanical systems and products that are manufactured at scale.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike precision work, drawing, or iterative physical testing.
work_lifestyle: CAD workstation and prototype lab; design review cycles; supplier interactions.
entry_route: Campus placement at OEMs or Tier-1 suppliers; strong CAD portfolio essential.
timeline: GET on joining; design engineer in 2 yrs; senior in 4–5 yrs.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹18L; premium OEMs and MNCs pay at the higher end.
growth_and_progression: Design engineer → senior → lead → chief engineer or R&D head.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; automotive, FMCG machinery, and industrial equipment always hiring.
honest_caveat: CAD tools and domain depth matter more than college brand in core design.

children.name: Manufacturing and Process Engineering
children.description: Optimise production processes, plant layouts, and quality systems at manufacturing facilities for automotive, FMCG, pharma, and industrial companies.

children.name: Production and Process Engineer
children.description: Manage production lines, cycle times, and process parameters to hit output targets and quality standards at automotive or FMCG manufacturing plants.

children.name: Automotive Assembly Process Engineer
children.description: Optimise body-in-white welding, paint shop, and final assembly processes at automotive plants — one of the most common Mech GET roles in India.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GET at OEM assembly plant → assembly process engineer → Lean Six Sigma certification → senior process engineer → manufacturing manager

children.name: FMCG or Pharma Production Engineer
children.description: Manage production lines for packaged consumer goods or pharmaceutical manufacturing at companies like HUL, ITC, Cipla, or Sun Pharma.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GET at FMCG or pharma plant → production engineer → senior production engineer → production manager in 6–8 yrs

what_it_is: Making factories run faster, better, and at lower cost through engineering.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike factory floors, shift-based work, or operational pressure.
work_lifestyle: Shop-floor and office mix; production targets; shift work common.
entry_route: GET at manufacturing plant; Lean Six Sigma certifications valuable.
timeline: GET → process engineer in 1–2 yrs; senior in 4 yrs; manager in 7–8.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹14L; MNC plants like Bosch, Honeywell, or 3M pay at the top.
growth_and_progression: Process engineer → senior → manufacturing manager → plant head.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; India's Make in India and PLI schemes expanding manufacturing base.
honest_caveat: Factory locations typically in industrial areas outside metro cities.

children.name: Quality Assurance and Reliability Engineer
children.description: Build and maintain quality management systems, inspection plans, and reliability test programmes at automotive, aerospace, or industrial manufacturing companies.

children.name: Automotive Supplier Quality Engineer
children.description: Manage PPAP submissions, incoming inspection, and supplier development for automotive components at Tier-1 companies supplying Maruti, Tata, or Honda.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GET in quality at Tier-1 supplier → SQE role → Six Sigma Green Belt → senior SQE → quality manager in 6–8 yrs

children.name: Aerospace or Defence Quality and Reliability Engineer
children.description: Manage AS9100 quality systems and reliability testing for aerospace components or defence equipment at HAL, BEL, or MRO service companies.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GET at HAL or BEL quality department → reliability engineer → senior quality engineer → quality manager

what_it_is: Ensuring manufactured products meet safety, regulatory, and customer standards.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike documentation, audits, or systematic compliance work.
work_lifestyle: Factory floor and office mix; customer audits; failure analysis investigations.
entry_route: GET in quality department; Six Sigma Green Belt and IATF training help.
timeline: QA engineer in 1–2 yrs; senior in 4 yrs; quality manager in 7–8 yrs.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹16L; Tier-1 automotive supplier QA roles pay at the higher end.
growth_and_progression: QA engineer → senior → quality manager → plant quality head → director.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; IATF 16949 and export mandates create constant demand.
honest_caveat: Heavily documentation-driven; technical excitement lower than design roles.

what_it_is: Engineering efficient, high-quality manufacturing processes at scale.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike factory environments or shift-based operations work.
work_lifestyle: Shop-floor presence; production targets; cross-functional with quality and supply.
entry_route: Campus placement at manufacturing companies; Lean and Six Sigma help.
timeline: GET → process engineer in 1–2 yrs; senior in 4–5 yrs; manager in 7–8.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹16L; MNC manufacturing plants pay significantly more than Indian SMEs.
growth_and_progression: Process engineer → senior → manufacturing manager → plant head.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; India's Make in India push creating long-term manufacturing demand.
honest_caveat: Factory locations often in industrial areas; not metro-based roles typically.

what_it_is: Physical product design, manufacturing process engineering, and quality roles.
who_its_not_for: Those who want purely digital careers or office-only work environments.
work_lifestyle: Shop-floor, lab, and CAD desk mix; physical and intellectually hands-on.
entry_route: Campus placement at OEMs, Tier-1 suppliers, and manufacturing companies.
timeline: Graduate Engineer Trainee on joining; design engineer in 2–3 yrs.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹20L depending on company type, domain, and specialisation.
growth_and_progression: Design lead → senior engineer → chief engineer or plant head track.
demand_and_outlook: Moderate; EV, aerospace, and defence sectors creating strong new demand.
honest_caveat: Starting salaries lower than CS; MBA or GATE speeds up progression significantly.

children.name: Automotive and Electric Vehicle Engineering
children.description: India's largest employer of Mechanical engineers — spanning traditional OEMs, EV startups, and Tier-1 suppliers in a rapidly transforming sector.

children.name: Electric Vehicle Powertrain and Systems Engineering
children.description: Design battery systems, motor controllers, and power electronics for India's growing EV industry across two-wheelers, three-wheelers, and cars.

children.name: Battery Systems and BMS Engineer
children.description: Design battery packs, thermal management systems, and battery management software for EVs at OEM EV divisions and battery startups in India.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → battery elective or project → intern at EV company → BMS or pack engineer → senior battery engineer in 3–4 yrs

children.name: EV Powertrain and Motor Systems Engineer
children.description: Design and validate electric motors, power electronics inverters, and drivetrain integration for two-wheelers and cars at Indian EV OEMs.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → EV powertrain projects → GET at Tata EV or Ola Electric → motor systems team → senior engineer in 3–4 yrs

what_it_is: Engineering the electrical and mechanical heart of electric vehicles.
who_its_not_for: Those who want purely mechanical roles without electrical system learning.
work_lifestyle: Cross-disciplinary; bench testing and simulation; fast startup-like iteration.
entry_route: EV electives in B.Tech; intern at Ola Electric, Ather, or Tata EV division.
timeline: EV engineer in 1–2 yrs post-B.Tech; senior in 3–4 yrs in this hot market.
salary_range: ₹7L–₹22L; EV startup equity adds significant potential upside.
growth_and_progression: EV engineer → systems lead → powertrain head → VP engineering.
demand_and_outlook: Very high; India's EV mission creating thousands of specialised roles.
honest_caveat: EV sector volatile; startup risk is real; OEM EV divisions more stable.

children.name: Traditional Automotive Engineering (ICE and NVH)
children.description: Work on conventional internal combustion engine vehicles — engine design, NVH reduction, and vehicle refinement at established OEMs and their supply chains.

children.name: Engine and Powertrain Development Engineer
children.description: Develop, calibrate, and validate ICE powertrains for fuel efficiency, emissions, and performance targets at Indian and Japanese OEMs.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → thermodynamics and engine electives → GET at Maruti or Honda → engine development team → senior engineer in 4 yrs

children.name: NVH and Acoustics Engineer
children.description: Measure, analyse, and reduce noise and vibration in vehicles using acoustic testing and CAE tools — a niche but high-value specialisation at premium OEMs.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → vibrations elective → GET at Toyota or Mahindra NVH lab → NVH engineer → specialist or senior engineer in 4–5 yrs

what_it_is: Engineering conventional vehicles for performance, efficiency, and NVH.
who_its_not_for: Those who want to work exclusively on next-generation electrification.
work_lifestyle: Engine test cell; acoustic lab; CAD simulation and test track mix.
entry_route: Campus placement at Maruti Suzuki, Honda, Toyota, or engine suppliers.
timeline: GET → engine or NVH engineer in 2 yrs; senior in 4–5 yrs.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹18L; Japanese OEMs and MNC Tier-1 suppliers pay at the top.
growth_and_progression: Engineer → senior → lead → chief engine or NVH technical specialist.
demand_and_outlook: Moderate and declining for pure ICE; hybrid experience extends relevance.
honest_caveat: ICE-only skills will face displacement over the next decade; diversify early.

what_it_is: Engineering vehicles, powertrains, and mobility systems for India and global markets.
who_its_not_for: Those who want fast digital product cycles or remote-first work cultures.
work_lifestyle: OEM and supplier campuses; test track and simulation mix; team-based projects.
entry_route: Campus placement at Tata, Mahindra, Maruti, Ola Electric, Ather, or Bosch.
timeline: GET on joining; engineer in 2 yrs; senior engineer in 4–5 yrs.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹22L; EV startups can offer equity on top of CTC.
growth_and_progression: Engineer → senior → systems lead → chief engineer → VP engineering.
demand_and_outlook: High and rising; India's EV push and PLI scheme for auto creating demand.
honest_caveat: EV transition is disrupting ICE roles; EV-specific skills increasingly essential.

children.name: Energy, Oil and Gas, and Public Sector
children.description: Power generation, oil and gas, and PSU careers that offer stability, scale, and long-term growth for Mechanical engineers.

children.name: Power and Energy Sector
children.description: Work in thermal, hydro, nuclear, or renewable energy generation and transmission at NTPC, BHEL, or private power companies across India.

children.name: NTPC or BHEL Management Trainee (Mechanical)
children.description: Join India's largest power generation company (NTPC) or heavy electrical manufacturer (BHEL) as a management trainee — prestigious PSU career with full government benefits.
children.salaryRange: ₹9L–₹16L / yr CTC with housing and all allowances
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GATE prep from Year 2 → score 700+ → NTPC or BHEL MT exam → training → confirmed engineer in 1 yr

children.name: Renewable Energy Engineer (Solar or Wind)
children.description: Design, commission, and maintain solar parks and wind farms at developers, EPC firms, and utilities — India's fastest-growing energy segment needs Mech engineers.

children.name: Solar EPC Project Engineer
children.description: Execute utility-scale solar plant construction — managing civil, electrical, and mechanical contractors at sites across Rajasthan, Gujarat, or Tamil Nadu.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GET at solar EPC firm → site engineer → project engineer → senior project engineer → project manager in 5–6 yrs

children.name: Wind Turbine Operations and Maintenance Engineer
children.description: Manage O&M of wind turbines at operating wind farms for asset owners and OEMs like Siemens Gamesa, Suzlon, or GE Vernova across India.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GET at wind O&M company → turbine O&M engineer → senior technician engineer → O&M team lead

what_it_is: Engineering India's renewable energy infrastructure for the energy transition.
who_its_not_for: Those who want product design or automotive roles rather than energy projects.
work_lifestyle: Site-based during commissioning; office-based for design and planning.
entry_route: GET at Adani Green, ReNew, or EPC firm; renewable energy elective helps.
timeline: GET → project engineer in 1–2 yrs; senior in 4 yrs; PM in 6–8 yrs.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹18L; IPP developers and MNC EPC firms pay at the higher end.
growth_and_progression: Project engineer → senior → project manager → portfolio manager → VP.
demand_and_outlook: High and rising; India targeting 500 GW renewable by 2030.
honest_caveat: Site postings in remote locations during project execution are common.

what_it_is: Engineering India's electricity generation and energy infrastructure at scale.
who_its_not_for: Those who want urban desk careers without operational plant exposure.
work_lifestyle: Power plant operations; shift rotations; maintenance and project cycles.
entry_route: GATE for NTPC and BHEL MT; campus placement at L&T Power or Adani.
timeline: MT → engineer in 1 yr; senior in 5 yrs; DGM in 12–15 yrs at NTPC.
salary_range: ₹8L–₹16L NTPC or BHEL CTC with housing, pension, and allowances.
growth_and_progression: MT → engineer → senior engineer → DGM → GM → director at NTPC.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; India's power capacity doubling creates long-term demand.
honest_caveat: Plant locations remote; social life and family postings can be challenging.

children.name: Oil and Gas Engineering
children.description: Work in upstream exploration, midstream pipelines, or downstream refining at ONGC, IOCL, Reliance, or international oil companies operating in India.

children.name: ONGC or IOCL Junior Engineer (Mechanical)
children.description: Work in oil field production, pipeline integrity, or refinery mechanical maintenance at ONGC or IOCL — stable government career with significant non-cash perks.
children.salaryRange: ₹8L–₹14L / yr CTC with remote area and HRA allowances
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GATE score → ONGC or IOCL JE or MT recruitment → technical and HR → field posting → senior engineer

children.name: Pipeline and Rotating Equipment Engineer
children.description: Design, inspect, and maintain pipelines, compressors, pumps, and turbines at oil and gas companies, EPC firms, and refineries across India.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → piping or rotating equipment elective → GET at EPC firm → pipeline or equipment engineer → senior engineer → discipline lead

what_it_is: Engineering India's hydrocarbon production, refining, and distribution systems.
who_its_not_for: Those who want city-based careers or are uncomfortable with remote sites.
work_lifestyle: Offshore platforms or remote onshore sites; rotation schedules; high pay.
entry_route: GATE for ONGC and IOCL; campus placement at Reliance or L&T Hydrocarbon.
timeline: GET or JE on joining; engineer in 2 yrs; senior in 5 yrs.
salary_range: ₹8L–₹18L PSU; offshore rotation roles can pay significantly more.
growth_and_progression: Engineer → senior → superintendent → operations manager → asset manager.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; India's refining capacity expansion and exploration drives hiring.
honest_caveat: Offshore postings demanding; ONGC and IOCL promotion ladders very slow.

what_it_is: Roles in thermal power, renewable energy, oil field operations, and PSUs.
who_its_not_for: Those who want fast-paced tech industry careers or metro-only lifestyles.
work_lifestyle: Plant-based or field operations; shift work possible; structured government pace.
entry_route: GATE for PSU management trainee roles; campus placement at EPC companies.
timeline: GET or MT on joining; engineer in 2 yrs; senior in 4–5 yrs; manager in 8+.
salary_range: ₹6L–₹18L PSU CTC with allowances; private EPC sector comparable.
growth_and_progression: MT → engineer → senior → DGM → GM over 15–20 yrs in PSU career.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; India's energy transition and infrastructure build-out driving demand.
honest_caveat: PSU promotion timelines are slow; rural or semi-urban postings are common.

children.name: Higher Studies, Research, and Government Services
children.description: Advanced degrees, research roles, and government civil services careers for Mechanical engineers seeking depth or public service.

children.name: M.Tech via GATE at IIT or NIT
children.description: Two-year postgraduate degree in Mechanical specialisations — opens premium industry placement, research roles, and IIT faculty preparation.

children.name: M.Tech in Thermal or Fluid Sciences
children.description: Specialise in thermodynamics, combustion, fluid mechanics, or heat transfer at IIT Bombay, Madras, or Kanpur — opens energy, ISRO, and DRDO research roles.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GATE 700+ → IIT M.Tech Thermal → thesis project → campus placement at ISRO, BHEL, or EPC firm

children.name: M.Tech in Design or Manufacturing
children.description: Specialise in advanced CAD, robotics, manufacturing processes, or precision engineering at IITs — opens aerospace, defence, and R&D roles.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GATE 700+ → IIT M.Tech Design or Manufacturing → thesis → campus placement at aerospace or advanced manufacturing firm

what_it_is: Advanced study in thermal, manufacturing, design, or robotics at IITs or NITs.
who_its_not_for: Those who want industry income within one year of B.Tech completion.
work_lifestyle: Coursework, thesis research, lab work; stipend-supported lifestyle.
entry_route: GATE Mechanical score 700+ for IIT M.Tech; 600+ for top NIT.
timeline: 2 yrs M.Tech; premium placement after or PhD continuation.
salary_range: ₹8L–₹25L placement after IIT M.Tech in premium companies.
growth_and_progression: M.Tech → premium OEM or research lab or IIT PhD → faculty or R&D head.
demand_and_outlook: Moderate; IIT M.Tech brand opens R&D and senior design engineer roles.
honest_caveat: GATE preparation takes 6–12 months seriously; stipend is modest during M.Tech.

children.name: UPSC Civil Services and Defence Services
children.description: Leverage Mechanical engineering analytical foundation to crack UPSC IAS, IPS, or CDS for a public service career in India's administration or armed forces.

children.name: IAS or IPS Officer (Engineering Optional)
children.description: Join IAS or IPS using Mechanical Engineering or General Studies optional — administer districts, lead police forces, or drive public infrastructure policy.
children.salaryRange: ₹10L–₹20L / yr 7th Pay Commission plus all allowances
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → UPSC prep 1–3 yrs → Prelims → Mains with Mech optional → Interview → LBSNAA training → posting

children.name: Engineering Services (UPSC ESE) — Mechanical
children.description: Join Central Government as a Class 1 officer in railways, defence production, or CPWD — technical government career specifically for Mechanical engineers.
children.salaryRange: ₹9L–₹15L / yr government scale with all central government benefits
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → ESE prep alongside or after B.Tech → Stage 1 and 2 → personality test → posting in railways or defence production

what_it_is: Civil administration, police, or military officer careers via national exams.
who_its_not_for: Those who want engineering or technical roles specifically throughout career.
work_lifestyle: Government postings; policy and administration; physically and mentally demanding.
entry_route: UPSC CSE after graduation; CDS for defence; ESE for engineering services.
timeline: 1–3 yrs UPSC prep after B.Tech; CDS and ESE 6–12 months prep each.
salary_range: ₹10L–₹20L IAS or IPS with allowances; ESE ₹10L–₹16L government scale.
growth_and_progression: IAS → DM → Secretary; ESE → senior engineer → director in government.
demand_and_outlook: About 900 UPSC ICS vacancies; ESE fewer than 300 mechanical seats/yr.
honest_caveat: Extremely competitive; 2–4 years of opportunity cost for most candidates.

children.name: DRDO Scientist (Mechanical and Aerospace)
children.description: Work on missile airframes, propulsion systems, and armoured vehicle development at India's premier defence R&D organisation.

children.name: DRDO Scientist (Aerospace Structures and Propulsion)
children.description: Work on missile airframe structures, rocket propulsion, and hypersonic vehicle design at DRDL Hyderabad or GTRE Bengaluru — India's most mission-driven Mech roles.
children.salaryRange: ₹8L–₹18L / yr Scientist B to D scale
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → DRDO SET exam → Scientist B at DRDL or GTRE → project posting → Scientist C on performance review

children.name: DRDO Scientist (Combat Vehicles and Armaments)
children.description: Develop armoured vehicle systems, artillery, and gun mechanisms at CVRDE Chennai or ARDE Pune — unique national defence contributions using Mechanical expertise.
children.salaryRange: ₹8L–₹18L / yr Scientist B to D scale
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → DRDO CEPTAM exam → Scientist B at CVRDE or ARDE → vehicle systems project → Scientist C

what_it_is: Developing India's strategic defence systems in a classified government lab.
who_its_not_for: Those who want commercial salaries, fast promotions, or public recognition.
work_lifestyle: Lab-based; classified projects; structured government pace of work.
entry_route: DRDO SET exam or CEPTAM after B.Tech; GATE score also considered.
timeline: Scientist B on joining; promotion every 4–5 yrs; long but stable career.
salary_range: ₹8L–₹18L / yr 7th Pay Commission with research and project allowances.
growth_and_progression: Scientist B → C → D → E → Distinguished Scientist over 20+ yrs.
demand_and_outlook: Limited seats; Mech stream always active in DRDO recruitment.
honest_caveat: Classified work limits external publications and professional visibility.

what_it_is: M.Tech via GATE, UPSC civil services, and defence research scientist paths.
who_its_not_for: Those who need immediate high income after B.Tech graduation.
work_lifestyle: Research lab or government office; structured; seminar and policy driven.
entry_route: GATE for M.Tech and PSU; UPSC after graduation; DRDO SET exam.
timeline: M.Tech 2 yrs; PhD 4–5 yrs; UPSC 1–3 yrs prep; DRDO exam after B.Tech.
salary_range: ₹8L–₹20L in government research; ₹20L–₹50L post-M.Tech in premium industry.
growth_and_progression: Research scientist, UPSC civil servant, or premium industry after M.Tech.
demand_and_outlook: Moderate; GATE opens PSU and IIT doors; UPSC highly competitive.
honest_caveat: Long preparation and study periods required; opportunity cost is real.

children.name: Cross-Functional and Emerging Roles
children.description: Roles where Mechanical engineers pivot into management consulting, supply chain, robotics, and tech-enabled functions leveraging domain expertise.

children.name: Supply Chain and Operations Management
children.description: Manage procurement, logistics, and production planning for manufacturing and e-commerce companies — Mechanical engineers have strong natural advantage here.

children.name: Supply Chain Analyst at Manufacturing or E-Commerce
children.description: Manage demand planning, inventory, and logistics at manufacturing companies or e-commerce platforms — Mechanical engineers have strong natural advantage in this function.

children.name: SCM Analyst at Automotive or Industrial Manufacturing
children.description: Manage supplier relationships, inbound logistics, and inventory levels at Tier-1 automotive or industrial manufacturing companies — close match to Mechanical background.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GET in materials or SCM department → SCM analyst → SAP or APICS certification → senior analyst → SCM manager in 5–6 yrs

children.name: Operations Analyst at E-Commerce or Logistics Company
children.description: Optimise fulfilment centre operations, last-mile delivery, and reverse logistics at companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Delhivery, or Shadowfax.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → GET or direct hire in operations at e-commerce → operations analyst → senior analyst → operations manager → VP operations

what_it_is: Optimising the flow of materials and goods across supply networks.
who_its_not_for: Those who prefer technical design over operations and vendor coordination.
work_lifestyle: Office and vendor visit mix; data-driven; quarterly planning cycles.
entry_route: GET in operations; supply chain elective; MBA SCM for fast-track growth.
timeline: SCM analyst on graduation; senior in 3–4 yrs; manager in 5–7 yrs.
salary_range: ₹6L–₹16L directly; ₹18L–₹40L post-IIM MBA in operations.
growth_and_progression: Analyst → senior → manager → VP supply chain → CPO track.
demand_and_outlook: Very high; e-commerce and manufacturing boom making SCM critical.
honest_caveat: Data skills separate fast from slow movers; Excel and SAP proficiency essential.

children.name: Operations and Management Consultant (Post-MBA)
children.description: Advise manufacturing, FMCG, and logistics companies on operational improvement, cost reduction, and supply chain transformation at consulting firms.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → 2 yrs industry → IIM or ISB MBA Operations → consulting firm → operations consultant → senior manager → partner track

what_it_is: Ensuring the right parts and products move efficiently through supply networks.
who_its_not_for: Those who prefer technical design over operations and vendor management.
work_lifestyle: Vendor visits; cross-functional stakeholder work; data-driven decision-making.
entry_route: Campus placement in operations; MBA in operations or SCM accelerates growth.
timeline: SCM analyst on graduation; senior in 3–4 yrs; manager in 5–7 yrs.
salary_range: ₹6L–₹18L directly; ₹18L–₹40L post-IIM MBA in operations.
growth_and_progression: SCM analyst → senior → manager → VP supply chain → CPO track.
demand_and_outlook: Very high; e-commerce boom and PLI scheme making SCM critical across India.
honest_caveat: Operations roles unglamorous early; data skills separate fast from slow movers.

children.name: Robotics and Automation Engineering
children.description: Build industrial robots, autonomous systems, and factory automation solutions — one of the fastest-growing specialisations for Mechanical engineers globally and in India.

children.name: Industrial Automation and Robotics Engineer
children.description: Program, integrate, and commission industrial robots from KUKA, ABB, or Fanuc at automotive assembly plants, EV gigafactories, and FMCG production lines.
skills: robot programming (KUKA KRL or ABB RAPID)
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → robotics elective and ROS projects → intern at automation firm → robotics engineer → senior automation engineer in 3–4 yrs

children.name: Autonomous Systems and Drone Engineer
children.description: Build autonomous ground vehicles, drones, and unmanned systems for defence, agriculture, and logistics applications — a cutting-edge niche with global demand.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Mech → autonomous systems or control elective → ROS project → intern at drone or robotics startup → autonomous systems engineer

what_it_is: Programming and integrating robots and automated systems in factories.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike software coding or cross-disciplinary mechanical-electrical work.
work_lifestyle: Lab and factory integration; cross-disciplinary teams; rapid prototyping cycles.
entry_route: Robotics electives in B.Tech; ROS and Python projects; KUKA or ABB internship.
timeline: Robotics engineer on graduation; senior in 3–4 yrs; specialist in 5–6 yrs.
salary_range: ₹7L–₹25L; global robotics MNCs and EV automation startups pay best.
growth_and_progression: Robotics engineer → senior → lead → automation manager → CTO at startup.
demand_and_outlook: High and growing; India's factory automation and EV gigafactory buildout driving.
honest_caveat: Requires software comfort; purely mechanical mindset insufficient here.

what_it_is: Consulting, supply chain, robotics, and management roles for Mech graduates.
who_its_not_for: Those who want to stay purely in traditional manufacturing or core design.
work_lifestyle: Office, client site, or hybrid; analytical and communication-heavy roles.
entry_route: MBA for consulting and management; direct hire for supply chain and robotics.
timeline: Supply chain analyst on graduation; senior in 3–4 yrs; MBA accelerates.
salary_range: ₹6L–₹25L directly; ₹20L–₹50L post-MBA in consulting or strategy.
growth_and_progression: Analyst → manager → director → VP or CPO track for supply chain.
demand_and_outlook: High for supply chain; growing fast for robotics and automation roles.
honest_caveat: MBA almost mandatory for consulting; supply chain needs domain plus analytics.

root.name: Civil
root.description: Career paths for B.Tech / B.E. — Civil in India

children.name: Construction and Project Management
children.description: Site-based and office roles managing the design, execution, and delivery of India's infrastructure projects.

children.name: Building Construction and EPC
children.description: Execute residential, commercial, industrial, and institutional building projects at large EPC contractors and developers across India.

children.name: Structural and Civil Site Engineer
children.description: Manage RCC, formwork, and finishing activities on building sites — the most common entry role for Civil B.Tech graduates at EPC contractors.

children.name: Site Engineer at Large EPC Contractor (L&T or Tata Projects)
children.description: Oversee day-to-day RCC, masonry, and MEP coordination on large commercial or industrial building projects at L&T Buildings or Tata Projects across India.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → campus placement at EPC → GET → site engineer → senior site engineer in 2–3 yrs → project engineer in 5 yrs

children.name: Site Engineer at Real Estate Developer (Oberoi or Godrej Properties)
children.description: Execute high-specification residential towers and commercial complexes at premium real estate developers — better work-life balance than EPC with location stability in metros.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → direct hire or campus at developer → site engineer → senior site engineer → construction manager in 6–8 yrs

what_it_is: Overseeing daily construction activities and quality on a building site.
who_its_not_for: Those who want design or office-only roles without site exposure.
work_lifestyle: 10–12 hr site days; contractor supervision; daily progress reporting.
entry_route: GET at large EPC; direct hire based on B.Tech score and interview.
timeline: Site engineer → senior in 2–3 yrs; assistant PM in 5 yrs.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹12L; large EPC firms pay ₹8L+ with allowances.
growth_and_progression: Site engineer → senior → PM → senior PM → VP projects.
demand_and_outlook: Very high; India's building sector always needs qualified site engineers.
honest_caveat: Site life is physically demanding; recognition takes years of patience.

children.name: Planning and Quantity Survey Engineer
children.description: Develop project schedules, estimate quantities, and manage cost control for construction projects — the office-facing technical role at an EPC organisation.

children.name: Project Planning Engineer
children.description: Build and update project schedules using Primavera P6 or MS Project, track progress, and produce look-ahead schedules for large EPC building or infrastructure projects.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GET in planning department → Primavera P6 cert → planning engineer → senior planning engineer → project controls manager

children.name: Quantity Surveyor and Cost Control Engineer
children.description: Prepare BOQs, rate analyses, and cost reports; process contractor bills; and manage project budgets at EPC contractors or real estate developers.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GET in QS department → BOQ and billing proficiency → senior QS → project cost manager → PMC cost lead

what_it_is: Controlling time and cost of construction projects through data and planning.
who_its_not_for: Those who want site execution or structural design roles primarily.
work_lifestyle: Office-based; Primavera and Excel-heavy; cross-functional with site team.
entry_route: GET in planning or QS department at EPC firm; Primavera P6 cert helps.
timeline: Planning engineer in 1–2 yrs; senior in 4 yrs; project controls lead in 6–7.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹16L; large EPC firms and PMC roles pay at the higher end.
growth_and_progression: Planning engineer → senior → project controls manager → VP planning.
demand_and_outlook: High; every large EPC project needs dedicated planning and cost control.
honest_caveat: Requires both technical and stakeholder communication skills to advance.

what_it_is: Managing the end-to-end construction of above-ground building projects.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike physically demanding sites or contractor negotiation.
work_lifestyle: Full-time site presence during execution; office during planning phase.
entry_route: Campus placement at L&T Buildings, Shapoorji, Tata Projects, or HCC.
timeline: GET → site engineer in 1 yr; senior in 4–5 yrs; PM in 7–8 yrs.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹16L; large EPC firms pay more than small regional contractors.
growth_and_progression: Site engineer → project engineer → project manager → VP construction.
demand_and_outlook: Very high; residential boom, data centres, and warehousing driving demand.
honest_caveat: Growth depends on site tenure; frequent relocations affect family life.

children.name: Infrastructure and Transportation Projects
children.description: Work on roads, highways, metro rail, bridges, and airport projects at NHAI contractors, railways EPC firms, and urban transport organisations.

children.name: Highway and Road Construction Engineer
children.description: Manage earthwork, pavement, and bridge sub-structure construction on NHAI highway projects — one of India's most active and continuously funded infrastructure sectors.

children.name: Highway Pavement and Earthwork Engineer
children.description: Manage subgrade preparation, granular sub-base, DBM, and BC pavement laying on NHAI four-lane and six-lane highway projects across India.
skills: IRC 37 and IRC SP 72 pavement design
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GET at highway EPC → pavement team → senior site engineer in 3 yrs → project engineer → project manager in 7 yrs

children.name: Bridge and Culvert Construction Engineer
children.description: Execute pile foundations, pier caps, girder launching, and deck construction for highway bridges and major culverts on NHAI corridor projects.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GET at EPC bridge division → bridge site engineer → senior engineer → bridge project engineer → PM in 7–8 yrs

what_it_is: Building the road surface, drainage, and structures on national highways.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike remote postings or extended site accommodation life.
work_lifestyle: Remote highway site; contractor coordination; night work during paving.
entry_route: GET at highway EPC company like Dilip Buildcon, IRB, or GR Infra.
timeline: GET → site engineer in 1 yr → senior in 3–4 yrs → PM in 7–8 yrs.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹14L with site allowances; NHAI PMC roles slightly higher.
growth_and_progression: Site engineer → project engineer → project manager → cluster head.
demand_and_outlook: Very high; PM Gati Shakti targets 2 km new highway construction per day.
honest_caveat: Remote corridor postings; social isolation is a genuine long-term challenge.

children.name: Metro Rail and Urban Transport Engineer
children.description: Work on metro rail viaducts, stations, tunnels, and civil works — urban infrastructure with better lifestyle than highway sites and high technical challenge.

children.name: Metro Viaduct and Station Civil Engineer
children.description: Manage pile foundation, pier, viaduct, and station structure construction on elevated metro corridors for cities like Bengaluru, Pune, or Hyderabad metro projects.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GET at metro rail contractor → viaduct civil team → senior site engineer in 3 yrs → project engineer in 5 yrs

children.name: Underground Metro Tunnelling Engineer
children.description: Support TBM-based tunnelling operations or cut-and-cover station construction for underground metro sections — niche, high-value, and internationally transferable skill.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GET at tunnelling contractor (Afcons or RVNL) → tunnel team → senior tunnelling engineer in 3–4 yrs → project engineer

what_it_is: Building elevated and underground metro rail civil infrastructure in cities.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike urban site complexity or multi-stakeholder environments.
work_lifestyle: Urban site or office; DMRC or MMRC contractor coordination; night work common.
entry_route: GET at L&T Metro, Afcons, or TATA Projects metro division.
timeline: Site engineer → senior in 3 yrs; project engineer in 5–6 yrs.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹16L; metro contractor and consultancy roles slightly above highway.
growth_and_progression: Site engineer → project engineer → construction manager → director.
demand_and_outlook: High; 27 cities have active or planned metro rail projects in India.
honest_caveat: Urban metro sites complex with utility conflicts; longer project cycles.

what_it_is: Building India's surface transport and mobility infrastructure at scale.
who_its_not_for: Those who want building construction or metro lifestyle exclusively.
work_lifestyle: Remote highway corridors or urban metro sites; long project durations.
entry_route: Campus placement at Dilip Buildcon, IRB, GR Infra, or L&T Infrastructure.
timeline: GET → engineer in 1 yr; senior in 4–5 yrs; PM in 7–8 yrs.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹16L; highway BOT companies and government PMC roles add perks.
growth_and_progression: Site engineer → project manager → cluster head → VP infrastructure.
demand_and_outlook: Very high; PM Gati Shakti and NHAI are running India's largest road push.
honest_caveat: Highway project sites are remote; social isolation is a real challenge.

what_it_is: Building roads, bridges, buildings, and utilities from drawing to handover.
who_its_not_for: Those who want office-only careers or dislike site visits and field work.
work_lifestyle: Site visits, contractor coordination, and office reporting mix daily.
entry_route: Campus placement at L&T, Shapoorji, NCC, or AFCONS; direct hire common.
timeline: GET or site engineer on joining; project manager in 5–7 yrs with experience.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹18L; large EPC and MNC contractors pay at the top end.
growth_and_progression: Site engineer → project manager → DGM projects → VP construction.
demand_and_outlook: Very high; India's infrastructure investment running at ₹10L Cr per year.
honest_caveat: Site postings often far from metros; frequent transfers are the norm.

children.name: Structural Design and Consulting Engineering
children.description: Technical design and analysis roles producing drawings, models, and reports for buildings, bridges, and infrastructure at consulting firms.

children.name: Building Structural Design
children.description: Analyse and design RCC and steel structures for residential, commercial, and industrial buildings at structural consulting firms and in-house developer teams.

children.name: RCC Structural Design Engineer
children.description: Design reinforced concrete slabs, beams, columns, and foundations for residential and commercial buildings using ETABS, STAAD, or SAFE at consulting firms.

children.name: Junior Structural Design Engineer at Indian Consultancy
children.description: Produce structural analysis models, reinforcement drawings, and design calculations for residential and commercial projects at mid-size Indian structural consulting firms.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → junior design engineer → ETABS proficiency → senior design engineer in 3 yrs → lead structural engineer in 6 yrs

children.name: Structural Design Engineer at MNC Consultancy (Arup or AECOM)
children.description: Work on complex high-rise, mixed-use, or industrial structural projects using advanced analysis at firms like Arup, AECOM, or Jacobs in India — higher pay and global exposure.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → M.Tech Structures at IIT → junior engineer at Arup or AECOM → senior structural engineer → associate director in 8–10 yrs

what_it_is: Creating safe, code-compliant RCC structures for India's building boom.
who_its_not_for: Those who want site execution work rather than office design roles.
work_lifestyle: Office-based; software analysis and drawing production; client reviews.
entry_route: Junior design engineer at structural consultancy; ETABS proficiency essential.
timeline: Junior engineer → senior in 3 yrs; design lead in 6 yrs; M.Tech helps.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹14L; MNC consultancies like Arup, AECOM, or WSP pay at top.
growth_and_progression: Junior → senior → lead → principal → associate director → director.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; India's building boom ensures constant structural design demand.
honest_caveat: Salary growth slow early on; M.Tech in structures accelerates significantly.

children.name: Steel Structure and Industrial Building Designer
children.description: Design pre-engineered steel buildings, warehouses, factories, and industrial sheds — high demand with India's warehousing and industrial construction boom.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → junior design engineer at steel structure firm → IS 800 proficiency → senior designer → lead design engineer in 4–5 yrs

what_it_is: Creating the structural skeleton of buildings using analysis software and codes.
who_its_not_for: Those who prefer construction management or site-based field careers.
work_lifestyle: Office-based CAD and analysis; client coordination; IS code adherence.
entry_route: Junior design engineer at structural consultancy; ETABS or STAAD proficiency key.
timeline: Junior engineer → senior in 3 yrs; design lead in 6–7 yrs.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹14L; MNC design firms like Arup or Mott MacDonald pay at top.
growth_and_progression: Junior engineer → senior → lead → principal → technical director.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; India's building boom ensures consistent demand for structural design.
honest_caveat: Starting salaries low; M.Tech in structural engineering helps accelerate.

children.name: Infrastructure and Bridge Design
children.description: Design bridges, flyovers, retaining walls, and large civil structures at design consultancies working with NHAI, NHIDCL, or state PWDs.

children.name: Bridge and Flyover Design Engineer
children.description: Analyse and design PSC girder bridges, cable-stayed bridges, and flyovers for NHAI and state highway authorities at design consultancies.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → junior design engineer at bridge consultancy → IRC code proficiency → senior bridge engineer → lead design engineer

children.name: Geotechnical and Foundation Design Engineer
children.description: Design pile foundations, retaining walls, and embankments based on soil investigation data for buildings and infrastructure projects.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → geotechnical consultancy → soil mechanics proficiency → senior geotechnical engineer → M.Tech Geotech for acceleration

what_it_is: Designing large civil structures that carry traffic, water, and public loads.
who_its_not_for: Those who want building design or construction management roles specifically.
work_lifestyle: Office-based structural analysis; site visits during construction review.
entry_route: Design consultancy placement; MIDAS Civil or CSiBridge proficiency helpful.
timeline: Junior engineer → senior in 3–4 yrs; lead in 6–7 yrs; M.Tech helps.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹16L; international consultancies like Arup and WSP pay best.
growth_and_progression: Junior → senior → bridge design lead → principal → technical director.
demand_and_outlook: High; India building 2 km of highway per day requires bridge design.
honest_caveat: Niche skill set; M.Tech in structures strongly advised for career acceleration.

what_it_is: Designing structures to safely carry loads using analysis and IS codes.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike desk-based technical calculation and drawing work.
work_lifestyle: Office-based; software-heavy; client review meetings; code compliance focus.
entry_route: Campus placement at structural consultancies; STAAD and ETABS proficiency needed.
timeline: Junior design engineer on joining; senior in 3–4 yrs; lead in 6–7 yrs.
salary_range: ₹4L–₹16L; international consultancies and large design firms pay most.
growth_and_progression: Junior → senior → lead → principal engineer → technical director.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; every building and infrastructure project needs structural design.
honest_caveat: Salary growth slower than EPC; M.Tech in structures accelerates significantly.

children.name: Government Services and Public Sector Roles
children.description: Stable, prestigious government careers for Civil engineers through PSU exams, state public works departments, and national organisations.

children.name: Central Government PSUs and UPSC ESE
children.description: Join CPWD, Railways, BRO, NHIDCL, or NBCC as a civil engineer via UPSC Engineering Services Exam — Class 1 officer career with central government benefits.

children.name: CPWD or NHIDCL Assistant Engineer
children.description: Join CPWD managing government building and road projects, or NHIDCL executing highways in Northeast India — prestigious Class 1 central service role.
children.salaryRange: ₹9L–₹15L / yr AE scale with HRA, DA, and TA
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → ESE prep 1–2 yrs → Stage 1 and 2 → personality test → AE posting at CPWD or NHIDCL → EE in 8–10 yrs

children.name: Indian Railways Civil Engineer (RRB JE or SSC JE)
children.description: Join Indian Railways as a Junior Engineer managing track, bridge, construction, or works projects — stable central government career with pension and housing.
children.salaryRange: ₹7L–₹12L / yr JE pay level 6 with all Railway allowances
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → RRB JE or SSC JE prep → exam → posting → junior engineer → senior section engineer in 5–7 yrs

what_it_is: Class 1 central government engineering roles managing national infrastructure.
who_its_not_for: Those who need high pay or metropolitan lifestyle exclusively.
work_lifestyle: All-India postings; project execution and inspection; government pace.
entry_route: UPSC ESE after B.Tech; Stage 1 objective + Stage 2 conventional + personality test.
timeline: 1–2 yrs ESE prep post B.Tech; AE joining; SE in 8–10 yrs.
salary_range: ₹9L–₹15L CTC with all central government allowances and housing.
growth_and_progression: AE → EE → SE → CE → Additional DG → DG over a 30-yr career.
demand_and_outlook: Fixed intake; under 300 Civil seats per ESE cycle; very competitive.
honest_caveat: All-India service postings; remote areas possible; lifestyle trade-off real.

children.name: State PWD, Municipal, and Water Resources
children.description: Join state Public Works Departments, Municipal Corporations, or Water Resources Departments as Assistant Engineer via state PSC exams.

children.name: State PWD Assistant Engineer
children.description: Manage road maintenance, building construction, and bridge inspection under PWD at district or circle level across any Indian state.
children.salaryRange: ₹6L–₹12L / yr state AE scale with all allowances
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → state PSC exam prep → written and interview → AE at PWD → EE in 8 yrs → SE → CE

children.name: Municipal Corporation Engineer (Water Supply or Drainage)
children.description: Plan and execute water supply pipelines, sewerage networks, and storm water drains for cities under Municipal Corporations — an important and under-resourced function in India.

children.name: Water Supply and Sewerage Engineer at Municipal Corporation
children.description: Execute water distribution network upgrades, sewage treatment plant expansion, and new pipeline laying under AMRUT or Smart Cities projects at Urban Local Bodies.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → state PSC exam → JE at municipal corporation → AE in 4 yrs → EE in charge of water supply division in 10 yrs

children.name: Storm Water and Solid Waste Infrastructure Engineer
children.description: Plan and execute storm water drainage networks, solid waste transfer stations, and sanitation facilities under Smart Cities or AMRUT programme funding.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → municipal JE → storm water drainage team → AE → EE sanitation division in 10 yrs

what_it_is: Engineering urban water and sanitation infrastructure for Indian cities.
who_its_not_for: Those who want building structures or highway construction roles.
work_lifestyle: Municipal office and site mix; contractor supervision; public interaction.
entry_route: State PSC or municipal recruitment exam; some urban bodies recruit directly.
timeline: JE on joining; AE in 3–4 yrs after confirmation; EE in 8–10 yrs.
salary_range: ₹6L–₹14L with state municipal scale and allowances.
growth_and_progression: JE → AE → EE → SE → CE at municipal corporation level.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; AMRUT 2.0 and Jal Jeevan Mission funding urban water infrastructure.
honest_caveat: Bureaucratic environment; political pressure on contractor approvals common.

what_it_is: State government engineering managing roads, water supply, and buildings.
who_its_not_for: Those who want central government Class 1 scale or private sector salaries.
work_lifestyle: State capital or district postings; inspection and execution; public-facing.
entry_route: State PSC Civil Engineering exam (Maharashtra, UP, Tamil Nadu, etc.).
timeline: 1 yr exam prep; AE joining; executive engineer in 8–10 yrs typically.
salary_range: ₹6L–₹14L CTC with state government allowances and housing.
growth_and_progression: JE → AE → EE → SE → CE at state government level.
demand_and_outlook: High; every state runs regular PSC cycles for civil engineering posts.
honest_caveat: State government salaries lower than central; promotion pace varies by state.

children.name: GATE-Based PSU Engineering Roles
children.description: Join RITES, NBCC, WAPCOS, NHPC, or IRCON as management trainee via GATE score — technical and project management PSU roles with attractive perks.

children.name: RITES or WAPCOS Management Trainee (Civil)
children.description: Join RITES (transport consultancy) or WAPCOS (water and infrastructure) as MT — project management, quality supervision, and international assignments possible.
children.salaryRange: ₹8L–₹14L / yr MT scale with PSU allowances
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GATE prep → score 600+ → RITES or WAPCOS exam → MT → project posting → senior engineer in 5 yrs

children.name: NHPC or THDC Management Trainee (Civil)
children.description: Join India's largest hydro power PSUs managing dam, powerhouse, and tunnel civil works — demanding site roles with full PSU security and remote allowances.
children.salaryRange: ₹8L–₹14L / yr with remote area and project allowances
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GATE → NHPC MT exam → training → civil works project posting → engineer → senior engineer

what_it_is: PSU engineering careers in infrastructure advisory, hydro, and international projects.
who_its_not_for: Those who want fast private-sector pay or location stability in one city.
work_lifestyle: PSU office and project sites; international postings possible at RITES and WAPCOS.
entry_route: GATE Civil score; PSU-specific written test and interview rounds after.
timeline: MT on joining; confirmed engineer in 1 yr; senior in 5 yrs; manager in 10.
salary_range: ₹8L–₹16L CTC with PSU benefits; international project allowances supplement.
growth_and_progression: MT → engineer → senior → DGM → GM → director over 20-yr PSU career.
demand_and_outlook: Limited seats; GATE Civil with score above 600 required for most PSUs.
honest_caveat: PSU promotion very slow; private sector lateral moves are common after 5–8 yrs.

what_it_is: Government civil engineering roles in PWD, PSUs, railways, and municipal bodies.
who_its_not_for: Those who want high commercial pay or fast private-sector career growth.
work_lifestyle: Government office and site mix; structured pace; posting rotation.
entry_route: GATE for PSUs and UPSC ESE; state PSC for PWD and municipal roles.
timeline: JE or AE on joining; executive engineer in 8–10 yrs; SE in 15–18 yrs.
salary_range: ₹7L–₹16L CTC with housing, pension, and allowances; stable and secure.
growth_and_progression: JE → AE → EE → SE → CE → Chief Engineer over 20–25 yr career.
demand_and_outlook: Steady; thousands of state PSC and PSU vacancies announced every year.
honest_caveat: Promotion timelines very slow; political interference can affect postings.

children.name: Real Estate, Urban Planning, and Environmental Engineering
children.description: Careers at the intersection of civil engineering, urban development, sustainability, and real estate management.

children.name: Real Estate Development and Project Management
children.description: Manage land acquisition, project approvals, and construction delivery for residential and commercial real estate at Indian developers.

children.name: Project Manager at Real Estate Developer
children.description: Own end-to-end construction delivery for residential towers or commercial complexes at premium developers — managing contractors, quality, and timelines simultaneously.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GET at developer → site engineer → project engineer → project manager in 5–7 yrs → senior PM → VP projects

children.name: Real Estate Technical and Due Diligence Analyst
children.description: Assess land feasibility, building technical compliance, and construction quality for investment decisions at real estate PE funds, banks, or developer head offices.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → 2 yrs site experience → technical team at RE fund or developer HQ → TDD analyst → senior analyst → head of technical

what_it_is: Taking real estate projects from land to handed-over building at developers.
who_its_not_for: Those who want pure structural design or government careers.
work_lifestyle: Site and office mix; regulatory liaison; buyer and contractor coordination.
entry_route: Direct hire by developer as GET; PG in real estate management or MBA helps.
timeline: Project executive on joining; manager in 4–5 yrs; senior manager in 7–8.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹18L; premium developers like Godrej, Oberoi, or DLF pay at the top.
growth_and_progression: Project executive → manager → VP projects → chief operating officer.
demand_and_outlook: High; India's housing and commercial real estate market growing strongly.
honest_caveat: Real estate sector cyclical; private developer finance risk affects job security.

children.name: Urban Planning and Smart Cities
children.description: Plan land use, transport corridors, and urban services for India's growing cities under the Smart Cities Mission, AMRUT, and state urban development authorities.

children.name: Urban Planner at City Government or Consultancy
children.description: Prepare master plans, zonal development plans, and transport studies for state urban development authorities or Smart City SPVs across India.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → M.Plan at IIT or SPA → urban planner at DUDA or consultancy → senior planner → planning director

children.name: Environmental and Sustainability Consultant
children.description: Conduct Environmental Impact Assessments and sustainability audits for construction projects, industrial facilities, and urban developments under India's EIA Notification.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → M.Tech Environmental or M.Sc → EIA consultancy → environmental consultant → LEED certification → senior consultant

what_it_is: Designing the spatial future of cities through land use and infrastructure planning.
who_its_not_for: Those who want building or structural design roles without planning interest.
work_lifestyle: Office-based with site surveys; stakeholder consultations; government liaison.
entry_route: M.Plan at IIT or SPA after B.Tech Civil; or direct hire at urban consultancy.
timeline: B.Tech then M.Plan 2 yrs; urban planner in 1 yr; senior in 4–5 yrs.
salary_range: ₹6L–₹20L; international urban consultancies and Smart Cities PMC best paid.
growth_and_progression: Junior planner → senior → project lead → director planning.
demand_and_outlook: Growing; Smart Cities Mission and AMRUT 2.0 funding urban planning.
honest_caveat: M.Plan almost mandatory; B.Tech Civil alone insufficient for senior roles.

what_it_is: Property development, city planning, sustainability consulting, and environmental roles.
who_its_not_for: Those who want pure construction site or structural design careers.
work_lifestyle: Office and site mix; regulatory interactions; city and property-scale planning.
entry_route: Direct hire by developer; M.Plan for urban planning; M.Tech for environment.
timeline: Junior role on graduation; manager in 5–6 yrs; director in 10–12 yrs.
salary_range: ₹5L–₹20L; real estate developers and MNC consultancies pay best.
growth_and_progression: Executive → manager → senior manager → VP → head of function.
demand_and_outlook: Growing; India's Smart Cities mission and ESG mandates creating new roles.
honest_caveat: MBA or M.Plan strongly advised for fast growth in these non-core Civil paths.

children.name: Higher Studies, Research, and Cross-Functional Paths
children.description: Advanced degrees, research careers, and cross-functional pivots for Civil engineers targeting IITs, UPSC, and management consulting.

children.name: M.Tech at IIT or NIT via GATE
children.description: Two-year postgraduate specialisation in structures, geotechnical, transport, water resources, or construction management at India's premier institutes.

children.name: M.Tech Structural Engineering (IIT)
children.description: Specialise in advanced structural analysis, earthquake engineering, and bridge design at IIT Bombay, Madras, or Roorkee — opens MNC consultancy and DRDO research roles.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GATE 650+ → IIT M.Tech Structures → thesis → campus placement at Arup, Mott MacDonald, or DRDO

children.name: M.Tech Construction Management or Geotechnical (NIT or IIT)
children.description: Specialise in construction project management, contracts, or geotechnical engineering — practical M.Tech tracks with strong placement at EPC and consultancy firms.
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → GATE → NIT or IIT M.Tech CM or Geotech → thesis → campus placement at large EPC or geotechnical consultancy

what_it_is: Advanced Civil engineering study opening research and premium industry roles.
who_its_not_for: Those who want industry income within one year of B.Tech completion.
work_lifestyle: Coursework, thesis research, lab work; modest stipend-supported lifestyle.
entry_route: GATE Civil score 650+ for IIT M.Tech; 550+ for top NITs.
timeline: 2 yrs M.Tech; premium placement or PhD continuation after.
salary_range: ₹8L–₹20L placement post-IIT M.Tech; PSU eligibility also opens.
growth_and_progression: M.Tech → IIT PhD → faculty or senior specialist; or premium industry.
demand_and_outlook: Moderate; IIT M.Tech brand opens design consultancy and PSU senior roles.
honest_caveat: GATE preparation takes 6–12 months seriously; stipend modest during study.

children.name: UPSC Civil Services and Engineering Services
children.description: Pursue IAS, IPS, or UPSC Engineering Services with Civil optional — the public service route for Civil engineers seeking national impact and administrative authority.

children.name: IAS Officer (Civil Engineering Optional)
children.description: Join Indian Administrative Service using Civil engineering as optional — administer districts, manage infrastructure projects, and shape urban and rural policy.
children.salaryRange: ₹10L–₹20L / yr 7th Pay Commission with all allowances and housing
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → UPSC prep 1–3 yrs → Prelims → Mains with Civil optional → Interview → LBSNAA training → SDM or collector posting

children.name: UPSC ESE Civil — CPWD or Railways Officer
children.description: Join CPWD as Assistant Engineer managing government buildings and roads, or Indian Railways managing civil works — prestigious Class 1 central engineering career.
children.salaryRange: ₹9L–₹15L / yr AE scale with all central government benefits
children.roadmap: B.Tech Civil → ESE prep 1–2 yrs → Stage 1 objective → Stage 2 conventional → personality test → AE at CPWD or Railways → EE in 8–10 yrs

what_it_is: Civil administration, police, or central government engineering officer careers.
who_its_not_for: Those who want technical design or construction management roles throughout.
work_lifestyle: Government postings; district administration or engineering project management.
entry_route: UPSC CSE or ESE after graduation; Civil engineering optional viable for both.
timeline: 1–3 yrs UPSC prep post B.Tech; ESE 1–2 yrs prep; both highly competitive.
salary_range: ₹10L–₹20L IAS with all allowances; ESE ₹9L–₹15L government scale.
growth_and_progression: IAS → DM → JS → Secretary; ESE AE → EE → SE → CE in government.
demand_and_outlook: About 900 UPSC ICS seats; ESE fewer than 300 Civil seats per year.
honest_caveat: Extremely competitive; 2–4 yrs opportunity cost; Civil optional is viable.

what_it_is: M.Tech, PhD, UPSC, and consulting paths leveraging Civil engineering foundation.
who_its_not_for: Those who want immediate industry roles without additional qualification time.
work_lifestyle: Research lab or consulting office; analytical and communication-heavy.
entry_route: GATE for M.Tech; UPSC after graduation; MBA for consulting pivot.
timeline: M.Tech 2 yrs; UPSC 1–3 yrs prep; MBA 2 yrs; each opens distinct doors.
salary_range: ₹8L–₹25L post-M.Tech in premium roles; ₹20L–₹50L post-MBA consulting.
growth_and_progression: IIT M.Tech → research or senior design; UPSC → IAS; MBA → consulting.
demand_and_outlook: Moderate; GATE opens IIT and PSU doors; UPSC highly competitive nationally.
honest_caveat: Each path has high opportunity cost; choose deliberately based on long-term goal.

root.name: Electrical
root.description: Career paths for B.Tech / B.E. — Electrical in India

children.name: Core Electrical & Power Systems
children.description: Traditional electrical engineering roles in generation, transmission, and distribution.

children.name: Power Grid & Transmission
children.description: Careers focusing on moving high voltage power across regional grids.

children.name: Grid Operations & Control
children.description: Monitoring real-time grid health and preventing cascading power outages.

children.name: SCADA Engineer
children.description: You design and monitor Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition systems for grid networks. This ensures operators have real-time visibility of power flows.
children.roadmap: Graduate Trainee → Junior SCADA Engineer → Lead Control Systems Engineer

children.name: Protection & Relay Engineer
children.description: You calculate fault currents and set up protective relays to isolate faults. This prevents massive cascading grid failures across the country.
children.roadmap: Junior Protection Engineer → Field Testing Engineer → Power Systems Consultant

what_it_is: Live monitoring of power dispatch and active relays.
who_its_not_for: Individuals easily stressed by high stakes emergencies.
work_lifestyle: Shift work in high tech operational control rooms.
entry_route: Entry level operational trainee roles at power grids.
timeline: Two years to master complex control software.
salary_range: ₹6L to ₹15L annually.
growth_and_progression: Promotes directly to shift manager or regional director.
demand_and_outlook: High demand with modern smart grid integrations.
honest_caveat: Rotating shift schedules can disrupt regular sleep patterns.

children.name: Power Distribution & Utilities
children.description: Designing and maintaining local step-down grids for city consumption.

children.name: Substation Design Engineer
children.description: You design layouts for transformers, switchgears, and control buildings in power substations. Your work directly enables safe power step-down for neighborhoods.
children.roadmap: Junior Design Engineer → Electrical Designer → Substation Project Lead

children.name: Field Maintenance Engineer
children.description: You manage on-site repairs and routine maintenance of transformers and overhead lines. This is a very hands-on role requiring strong safety awareness.
children.roadmap: Trainee Engineer → Assistant Engineer → Maintenance Manager

what_it_is: Localized power delivery and municipal distribution network management.
who_its_not_for: People averse to dealing with public city infrastructure.
work_lifestyle: Field work combined with utility office planning.
entry_route: Discom exams or state electricity board roles.
timeline: Three years to lead distribution planning zones.
salary_range: ₹4L to ₹12L annually.
growth_and_progression: Highly bureaucratic but offers immense job security.
demand_and_outlook: Constant need due to massive urban expansion.
honest_caveat: Dealing with power theft and municipal politics daily.

what_it_is: Managing vast electrical networks and high voltage substations.
who_its_not_for: People who dislike regulatory compliance and strict safety.
work_lifestyle: Often involves rural or regional site travel.
entry_route: Core engineering internships and major core placements.
timeline: Three years to manage independent grid sections.
salary_range: ₹5L to ₹18L annually.
growth_and_progression: Slow but features excellent lifelong job security.
demand_and_outlook: Evergreen due to constant infrastructure expansion needs.
honest_caveat: Safety protocols are strictly enforced and demanding.

children.name: Renewable Energy & Smart Grids
children.description: Transitioning from fossil fuels to sustainable and intelligent power generation.

children.name: Solar & Wind Power Systems
children.description: Engineering utility-scale solar farms and wind turbine networks.

children.name: Solar PV Design Engineer
children.description: You calculate solar irradiance, select inverters, and draft structural layouts for solar parks. You use software to maximize energy generation efficiency.
children.roadmap: Graduate Engineer → PV Designer → Lead Solar Consultant

children.name: Wind Farm Integration Engineer
children.description: You work on integrating massive wind turbines into the local power grid safely. You handle the power quality issues that arise from fluctuating wind.
children.roadmap: Integration Engineer → Grid Compliance Specialist → Wind Project Lead

what_it_is: Designing solar panels and turbines for optimal yield.
who_its_not_for: Those who prefer indoor air conditioned desk jobs exclusively.
work_lifestyle: Extensive time at remote outdoor energy farm sites.
entry_route: EPC contractors and massive renewable energy developers.
timeline: Three years to become a lead site manager.
salary_range: ₹4L to ₹18L annually.
growth_and_progression: Fast paced with numerous regional leadership opportunities.
demand_and_outlook: High demand in sun rich and coastal states.
honest_caveat: Harsh weather conditions at remote rural installation sites.

children.name: Microgrid & Smart Infrastructure
children.description: Building localized smart grids that can operate independently using digital tools.

children.name: Smart Grid Consultant
children.description: You advise utilities on integrating smart meters and two-way communication systems. Your strategies help reduce transmission losses and optimize demand.
children.roadmap: Energy Analyst → Grid Consultant → Principal Smart Grid Strategist

children.name: Energy Storage Systems Engineer
children.description: You design massive battery banks to store excess renewable energy for later use. This role bridges core electrical with advanced battery chemistry.
children.roadmap: Storage Engineer → R&D Specialist → Energy Storage Architect

what_it_is: Decentralized power generation and advanced IoT monitoring.
who_its_not_for: Engineers strictly focused on pure traditional analog hardware.
work_lifestyle: High tech laboratory work and urban field testing.
entry_route: Startups and modern tech focused energy companies.
timeline: Two years to master complex microgrid software architecture.
salary_range: ₹6L to ₹25L annually.
growth_and_progression: Rapid career acceleration in modern green tech sectors.
demand_and_outlook: Growing fast in urban centers and industrial zones.
honest_caveat: Energy storage technology evolves rapidly requiring constant learning.

what_it_is: Green energy harvesting and digital smart grid integration.
who_its_not_for: Traditionalists preferring legacy thermal or coal power plants.
work_lifestyle: Project based travel to large solar and wind farms.
entry_route: Specialized green energy programs or private EPC contractors.
timeline: Fast career progression over two to three years.
salary_range: ₹5L to ₹22L annually.
growth_and_progression: Exponential growth due to massive national green initiatives.
demand_and_outlook: Skyrocketing as international corporate climate targets approach.
honest_caveat: Remote project locations can be physically taxing.

what_it_is: Heavy engineering and large scale power management.
who_its_not_for: Those wanting rapid remote software desk jobs.
work_lifestyle: Mix of desk design and active site visits.
entry_route: GATE exam or direct campus placements.
timeline: Two to four years for senior roles.
salary_range: ₹4L to ₹20L depending on PSU or private.
growth_and_progression: Steady and highly stable over decades.
demand_and_outlook: Consistent demand for national grid modernization.
honest_caveat: Government PSU roles are intensely competitive.

children.name: Electronics & Semiconductor
children.description: Moving into the micro-scale world of chip design and embedded tech.

children.name: VLSI & Chip Design
children.description: The highly paid niche of designing semiconductors and microprocessors.

children.name: Front-End Design & Verification
children.description: Writing code to define how a microchip behaves logically before manufacturing.

children.name: ASIC/FPGA Design Engineer
children.description: You write Verilog or VHDL to design the logical architecture of chips. You map out exactly how data flows through processors and memory arrays.
children.roadmap: Junior RTL Designer → FPGA Engineer → ASIC Architect

children.name: Design Verification Engineer
children.description: You actively try to break the chip's logic using complex testing frameworks. Your job is to find logical flaws before the chip is printed.
children.roadmap: DV Engineer → Senior DV Engineer → Verification Manager

what_it_is: Register transfer level coding and digital logic simulation.
who_its_not_for: Those who dislike writing extensive code test benches.
work_lifestyle: Agile software environments applied to deep hardware design.
entry_route: RTL design tests and complex digital logic interviews.
timeline: Two years to master verification frameworks and methodologies.
salary_range: ₹10L to ₹30L annually.
growth_and_progression: Fast track to logic lead and architecture roles.
demand_and_outlook: Design verification engineers are in massive corporate demand.
honest_caveat: Verification takes up the vast majority of project time.

children.name: Back-End Design & Testing
children.description: Translating logical code into physical silicon layouts and testing prototypes.

children.name: Physical Design Engineer
children.description: You convert logical schematics into physical geometric layouts for silicon manufacturing. You ensure the chip meets timing, power, and area constraints.
children.roadmap: PD Trainee → PD Engineer → Physical Design Lead

children.name: DFT Engineer
children.description: You implement Design for Testability features so manufactured chips can be easily checked for defects. You ensure factory production yields remain high.
children.roadmap: DFT Engineer → Senior DFT Engineer → Yield Optimization Lead

what_it_is: Placing billions of transistors and routing microscopic wires.
who_its_not_for: Those impatient with intricate geometry and physics rules.
work_lifestyle: Deeply focused layout work using massive compute servers.
entry_route: Physical design training academies and specialized bootcamps.
timeline: Three years to manage complex multi block tape-outs.
salary_range: ₹8L to ₹35L annually.
growth_and_progression: Highly valued skill for leading major tape-out projects.
demand_and_outlook: Very high as chip transistor density scales up.
honest_caveat: Tape-out deadlines frequently require extremely stressful overtime.

what_it_is: Transistor level design and extensive chip logic verification.
who_its_not_for: People seeking immediate hands on field execution roles.
work_lifestyle: Long focused hours in front of EDA software tools.
entry_route: Specialized CDAC or dedicated VLSI training institutes.
timeline: Five years to reach senior logic architect levels.
salary_range: ₹10L to ₹40L annually.
growth_and_progression: Outstanding financial growth and excellent global mobility.
demand_and_outlook: Severe specialized talent shortage in the Indian market.
honest_caveat: A single logical bug can ruin a million-dollar chip.
